patch.value: Configurable Up Next count, milestone grouping, --since warning + friendly export errors

--up-next <n> and --all-open control Up Next size (default 3); --group-by milestone buckets by milestone with (no milestone) fallback; unparseable --since warns instead of silently dropping the window; standup export --output to an unwritable path raises a friendly CommandError not a raw fs stack.

Verified shipped on main (hands-on 2026-06-12, CLI 2026.6.11): --up-next/--all-open, --group-by milestone w/ (no milestone) fallback, unparseable --since warns instead of silently dropping, export --output unwritable path raises friendly CommandError. All acceptance criteria pass; no code change needed.
